chunks.title: Inline, Internal & External CS
chunks.text: In this video, we will see how to add CSS to an HTML page.  There are three ways to add CSS to HTML.  The first way is inline CSS which is used as a style attribute and added to HTML pages.  The second way is internal CSS.  Internal CSS means to put a style tag and put the CSS of that HTML in the style tag of the HTML page.

chunks.title: Inline, Internal & External CS
chunks.text: And after that, the most used is external CSS.  Make a .css file and put all your styles in that .css file.  In this video, I will tell you very closely what is the difference between the three, when to use and when to avoid.  I am very excited.  Do like this video and don't forget to write Sigma Patch OP in the comment section below.
